open_data.description: City of Montgomery open data portal

budget.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=Edge,chrome=1"/>
    <meta name="fragment" content="#!"/>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
    <meta name="msapplication-tap-highlight" content="no"/>
    <meta name="title" content="City of Montgomery, AL | Open Finance">
    <meta name="description" content="City of Montgomery, AL | Open Finance">

    <meta property="og:title" content="City of Kingman Open Finance"/>
    <meta property="og:description" content="Open Finance is part of our commitment to improving transparency by providing a guided view through complex financial information."/>
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://cityofmontgomery-al-of.finance.socrata.com/">

    <meta property="og:image" content="https://cityofkingman.data.socrata.com/api/views/3fjd-z454/files/2520dde9-9806-4000-a167-5f4b37589396?filename=Icon.jpg">
    <meta property="og:image:width" content="1400">
    <meta property="og:image:height" content="650">
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="City of Kingman Open Finance">
    <meta name="twitter:description" content="Open Finance is part of our commitment to improving transparency by providing a guided view through complex financial information.">
    <meta name="twitter:site" content="@socrata">

    <title>City of Montgomery, AL | Open Finance</title>
    <link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/x-icon" href="https://montgomery-al.data.socrata.com/api/views/hnc4-sxi4/files/6efb4a64-06c7-447e-9d0b-a5072a674371" />



    <link href="//fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Open+Sans:400,600,700,400italic,300,300italic" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">
    

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/finance/open-finance/assets/application-de69c91a01464a41a4ad9aec025654ece0f18c37d0320f920d630f3227d53a75.css" media="all" />

    <style type="text/css">

      @font-face {
        font-family: "socrata-icons";
        src: url(/open-data/socrata-icons.eot);
        src: url(/open-data/socrata-icons.eot?#iefix) format("eot"),
        url(/open-data/socrata-icons.woff2) format("woff2"),
        url(/open-data/socrata-icons.woff) format("woff"),
        url(/open-data/socrata-icons.ttf) format("truetype"),
        url(/open-data/socrata-icons.svg#socrata-icons) format("svg");
        font-weight: normal;
      }

      @font-face {
          font-family: 'icomoon';
          src:url(/fonts/icomoon.eot?b5hmxf);
          src:url(/fonts/icomoon.eot?b5hmxf#iefix) format('embedded-opentype'),
            url(/fonts/icomoon.ttf?b5hmxf) format('truetype'),
            url(/fonts/icomoon.woff?b5hmxf) format('woff'),
            url(/fonts/icomoon.svg?b5hmxf#icomoon) format('svg');

          font-weight: normal;
          font-style: normal;
        }

        html body .app-header .navbar-default {
    background-color: #05252f;
  }

html body .exploration-link-component .card-body .card-link {
    color: #FFFFFF;
    background-color: #05252F;
}

html body .exploration-link-component .card-body .card-link:hover {
    color: #607d83;
    background-color: #ffffff;
}

html body .related-content .panel .panel-footer span {
    color: #FFFFFF;
    background-color: #05252F;
}

html body .related-content .panel .panel-footer span:hover {
    color: #607d83;
    background-color: #ffffff;
}

  html body .search-view-container .views-container #view-button {
    background-color: #05252F;
  }

  html body .search-view-container .views-container #view-button {
    color: #FFFFFF;
  }

      <!-- Integrated mode and not logged in -->

<!-- Integrated Mode Styles -->

<!-- Unified Mode Styles -->
  .site-wrapper {
    margin-top: 50px;
  }

    </style>

    <link href="//cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/4.7.0/css/font-awesome.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css"/>
    <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/d3/3.5.17/d3.min.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js" integrity="sha384-YvpcrYf0tY3lHB60NNkmXc5s9fDVZLESaAA55NDzOxhy9GkcIdslK1eN7N6jIeHz" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
    <!-- Angular.js NES v1.9.11 (Hero Devs LTS) loaded via asset pipeline from vendor/assets/javascripts -->

  </head>
  <body ng-app="FinanceDashboard">
    <section class="site-wrapper">
      <!-- Header for SCGC Mode -->
        <div class="unified-header">
  <style type="text/css">
    .unified-header {
  font-family: 'Open Sans', Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.618;
  color: #5e5e5e;
  margin: 0px;
  padding: 0px;
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 9999;
  top: 0;
  height: 50px;
  width: 100%;
  /*Search filter menu */
  /*search container*/
  /*search dropdown css */ }
  .unified-header .unified-header-overlay {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    display: none;
    height: 50px;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    width: 100%; }
  .unified-header .unified-navbar {
    font-size: 18px;
    min-height: 50px;
    text-shadow: none;
    background-color: #05252f;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between; }
    .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-navbar-header {
      margin-left: 10px; }
      .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-navbar-header img {
        height: 40px;
        margin: 5px 10px 5px 0px;
        vertical-align: middle; }
      .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-navbar-header .site-display-name a {
        color: #ffffff;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-weight: 500;
        font-size: 16px;
        vertical-align: middle;
        line-height: 50px; }
    .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links {
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      list-style: none;
      margin: 0;
      padding-left: 0; }
      .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li {
        cursor: pointer;
        display: inline-block;
        height: 50px;
        line-height: 50px;
        padding-left: 10px;
        padding-right: 10px; }
        .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li.header-link:hover {
          text-decoration: underline; }
        .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li a {
          text-align: center;
          text-decoration: none; }
          .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li a .fb-name, .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li a .twitter-name {
            display: none; }
          .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li a.list-link {
            color: #ffffff;
            line-height: 50px;
            vertical-align: middle; }
          .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li a.social-link {
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 17px;
            height: 20px;
            vertical-align: middle;
            width: 20px; }
            .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li a.social-link .icon-twitter-new {
              padding-bottom: 17px;
              font-size: 10.5px;
              -webkit-text-fill-color: inherit;
              -webkit-text-stroke-width: .05rem;
              -webkit-text-stroke-color: inherit; }
        .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li.unified-header-dropdown-menu {
          position: relative; }
          .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li.unified-header-dropdown-menu .list-link {
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            color: #ffffff; }
          .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li.unified-header-dropdown-menu:hover, .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li.unified-header-dropdown-menu:focus, .unified-header .unified-navbar .unified-header-links li.unified-header-dropd

state_of_city.description: Mayor Reed 2026 State of the City Address
